title: Backend Developer Vacancy at ECIL - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at ECIL - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ECIL. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Backend Developer to strengthen our Jaipur-based team.

About ECIL:
ECIL is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in React

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ECIL!
